<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="authorization">Authorization<a href="#authorization" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Authorization" title="Direct link to Authorization" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>You can only access the REST API via https. In order to access the REST API you need to use an Access Token. You can generate an Access Token by going to your Organization's Account page.</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="Account Tab" width="966" height="152" class="img_ev3q" src="/assets/images/account-tab-d7f42610fbb444812ea01fd47714a3dd.png"></p>
<p>In the API Tokens section click on Generate Token.</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="Generate Token" width="966" height="149" class="img_ev3q" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<p>Give your token a name and click the button to create your new token. A new window will appear showing you your new access token.</p>
<p>Make sure you note that down because you will not be able to see the token once you close this window. This token is meant to be kept secret so do not share it with anyone other than your team (for example do not post this on forums).</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="New Token" width="966" height="340" class="img_ev3q" src="/assets/images/new-token-62e0f97da899f6ebd11cf02adb0290aa.png"></p>
<p>From your Account page you can also Revoke all the tokens you have generated or a specific one. You can also edit the name of a token.</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="Remove Token" width="966" height="190" class="img_ev3q" src="/assets/images/remove-token-61a42c8ca8844ada83ba0869de375e48.png"></p>
<p>When you make calls to the API you must set the 'Authorization' header in your HTTP request to this value:</p>
<div class="language-none codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-none codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">Bearer [access_token]</span><br></div></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<p>Replace <code>[access_token]</code> with an Access Token you generated in your Account page.</p>
<p>For example:</p>
<div class="language-none codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-none codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">curl -H "Authorization: Bearer nesgdxhiqe7hylfilr6ss1rds0gq1uj8" https://playcanvas.com/api/...</span><br></div></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Toggle word wrap" title="Toggle word wrap" class="clean-btn"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="wordWrapButtonIcon_b1P5" aria-hidden="true"><path fill="currentColor" d="M4 19h6v-2H4v2zM20 5H4v2h16V5zm-3 6H4v2h13.25c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2s-.9 2-2 2H15v-2l-3 3l3 3v-2h2c2.21 0 4-1.79 4-4s-1.79-4-4-4z"></path></svg></button><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="parameters">Parameters<a href="#parameters" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Parameters" title="Direct link to Parameters" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Various routes accept a number of parameters. For GET requests if the parameter is not part of the URL, you can pass it as an HTTP query string parameter. For POST, PUT and DELETE requests parameters not included in the URL should be encoded as JSON with a Content-Type of 'application/json'.</p>
<p>There are several common parameters that are used in each endpoint:</p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="project_id">project_id<a href="#project_id" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to project_id" title="Direct link to project_id" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>This can be found in the URL on the project overview page.</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="Project ID" width="786" height="245" class="img_ev3q" src="/assets/images/project-id-ce30a2e4e77cb2f3f373887929dc6366.png"></p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="scenes">scenes<a href="#scenes" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to scenes" title="Direct link to scenes" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>When opening a scene in the Editor, the scene id is in the URL.</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="Scene ID" width="786" height="245" class="img_ev3q" src="/assets/images/scene-id-5c9c9789d82c40b63f8c6adeb202379d.png"></p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="branch_id">branch_id<a href="#branch_id" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to branch_id" title="Direct link to branch_id" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>This is found in the <a class="" href="/user-manual/editor/version-control/">version control</a> panel and can be selected and copied.</p>
<p><img decoding="async" loading="lazy" alt="Branch ID" width="877" height="242" class="img_ev3q" src="/assets/images/branch-id-ded3d7225d2f6b7efe9e039304ea9d83.png"></p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="response-format">Response Format<a href="#response-format" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Response Format" title="Direct link to Response Format" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Our REST API is following some generic guidelines when it comes to the response format of each API call.</p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="get-resource">GET resource<a href="#get-resource" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to GET resource" title="Direct link to GET resource" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>If you are trying to GET a single resource the response will be a JSON object with the resource you requested.</p>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="get-multiple-resources">GET multiple resources<a href="#get-multiple-resources" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to GET multiple resources" title="Direct link to GET multiple resources" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>If you are trying to GET multiple resources like for example listing the Apps of a Project you will get a JSON object with this format:</p>
<div class="language-none codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-none codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">{</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">    "result": [</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        resource_1,</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        resource_2,</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        ...,</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        resource_N</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">    ],</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">    "pagination": {</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        "limit": number,</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        "skip": number,</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">        "total": number</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">    }</span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">}</span><br></div></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<p>As you can notice the response in this case also contains pagination data. To control the pagination of the response you can pass the following URL parameters:</p>
<table><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>limit</code></td><td>The maximum number of items to include in the response.</td></tr><tr><td><code>skip</code></td><td>The number of items to skip from the original result set.</td></tr><tr><td><code>sort</code></td><td>The name of the field to use to sort the result set. See the documentation of each request to see which values are allowed here.</td></tr><tr><td><code>order</code></td><td>If you want results in ascending order pass 1 otherwise pass -1 for descending order.</td></tr></tbody></table>
<p>So for example to get 32 items after the first 16 items you would send this request:</p>
<div class="language-none codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-none codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">https://playcanvas.com/api/items?limit=32&amp;skip=16</span><br></div></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="errors">Errors<a href="#errors" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Errors" title="Direct link to Errors" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<p>When an error is raised you will get a JSON object with this format:</p>
<div class="language-json codeBlockContainer_Ckt0 theme-code-block" style="--prism-color: #393A34; --prism-background-color: #f6f8fa;"><div class="codeBlockContent_QJqH"><pre tabindex="0" class="prism-code language-json codeBlock_bY9V thin-scrollbar" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52); background-color: rgb(246, 248, 250);"><code class="codeBlockLines_e6Vv"><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token punctuation" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);">{</span><span class="token plain"></span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain">    </span><span class="token property" style="color: rgb(54, 172, 170);">"error"</span><span class="token operator" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);">:</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token string" style="color: rgb(227, 17, 108);">"This is the error message"</span><span class="token plain"></span><br></div><div class="token-line" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token punctuation" style="color: rgb(57, 58, 52);">}</span><br></div></code></pre><div class="buttonGroup_M5ko"><button type="button" aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" title="Copy" class="clean-btn"><span class="copyButtonIcons_IEyt" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonIcon_TrPX"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19,21H8V7H19M19,5H8A2,2 0 0,0 6,7V21A2,2 0 0,0 8,23H19A2,2 0 0,0 21,21V7A2,2 0 0,0 19,5M16,1H4A2,2 0 0,0 2,3V17H4V3H16V1Z"></path></svg><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="copyButtonSuccessIcon_cVMy"><path fill="currentColor" d="M21,7L9,19L3.5,13.5L4.91,12.09L9,16.17L19.59,5.59L21,7Z"></path></svg></span></button></div></div></div>
<p>Also the status code of the response will be the appropriate HTTP error code.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_Vzrq" id="rate-limiting">Rate Limiting<a href="#rate-limiting" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Rate Limiting" title="Direct link to Rate Limiting" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Calls to the REST API have a rate limit. Check your actual limits by querying <a href="https://playcanvas.com/api/ratelimits" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">this endpoint</a>. There are different rate limits depending on the request:</p>
<table><thead><tr><th>Rate Limit Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Limit for free accounts</th><th>Limit for personal/org accounts</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Normal</td><td>The normal rate limit</td><td>120 requests/minute</td><td>240 requests/minute</td></tr><tr><td>Strict</td><td>The strict rate limit</td><td>5 requests/minute</td><td>10 requests/minute</td></tr><tr><td>Assets</td><td>The assets rate limit</td><td>60 requests/minute</td><td>120 requests/minute</td></tr></tbody></table>
<p>The response will contain the following headers to help you regulate how often you call the API:</p>
<table><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>X-RateLimit-Limit</code></td><td>The number of requests allowed in a minute.</td></tr><tr><td><code>X-RateLimit-Remaining</code></td><td>The remaining number of requests that you are allowed to make this minute.</td></tr><tr><td><code>X-RateLimit-Reset</code></td><td>The time at which the current rate limit window resets in <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unix_time" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">UTC epoch seconds</a>.</td></tr></tbody></table>
<p>If you exceed the rate limit you will get a <code>429 Too Many Requests</code> status code. You will have to wait for the current window to reset in order to continue making requests.</p></div><footer class="theme-doc-footer docusaurus-mt-lg"><div class="row margin-top--sm
